summarization.a: The figure shows an atomic force microscopy image of the conventional HEMT.
summarization.b: The figure shows an atomic force microscopy image of the Ga2O3 MOS-HEMT.

a.question: Which HEMT has the highest RMS value?
a.answer: The conventional HEMT with a RMS value of 0.532 nm.

b.question: What is the HEMT developed in this study?
How does the RMS value change between the samples?
b.answer: The Ga2O3 MOS-HEMT has the lowest RMS value compared to the conventional AlGaN HEMT.

b.question: Has there been a significant change in the RMS value?
b.answer: No, this could mean that both surfaces are smooth.
